name: chaos-harness
description: Claude Code Agent Constraint Framework - Iron Laws, Bypass Detection, Laziness Monitoring, Adaptive Workflow, Self-Correction Hooks

skills.name: overview
skills.description: 系统概览、铁律状态、学习进度、项目统计

skills.name: project-scanner
skills.description: 项目扫描、类型检测、技术栈分析、自适应建议

skills.name: version-locker
skills.description: 版本管理、锁定、创建、变更追踪

skills.name: harness-generator
skills.description: 约束生成、基于扫描数据生成专属 Harness

skills.name: workflow-supervisor
skills.description: 工作流编排、阶段控制、进度监控、Agent协调

skills.name: iron-law-enforcer
skills.description: 铁律执行、自定义规则、绕过检测、驳回生成

skills.name: collaboration-reviewer
skills.description: 多Agent协作、角色分配、冲突检测、结果合并

skills.name: hooks-manager
skills.description: 钩子配置、启用/禁用、日志查看、行为审计

skills.name: plugin-manager
skills.description: 插件管理、第三方接入、约束配置、阶段映射

skills.name: project-state
skills.description: 状态持久化、进度保存、会话恢复、断点续传

skills.name: auto-toolkit-installer
skills.description: 工具链检测、自动安装依赖工具、镜像加速
